_comment: Coverage factory target list, priority order. status lives in _factory-state.json. language drives which plugin the improve-loop may edit. 'hint' seeds the scout step.

targets.name: express
targets.hint: Express 4/5: app.get/post/put/delete('/path', handler), express.Router(), router.get(...). Programmatic routing.

targets.name: hono
targets.hint: Hono: const app = new Hono(); app.get('/path', c => c.json(...)). Edge/Bun-native.

targets.name: nestjs
targets.hint: NestJS: @Controller('/orders') class + @Get(':id')/@Post() method decorators. Decorator-based, NOT app.get().

targets.name: laravel
targets.hint: Laravel: Route::get('/path', ...), Route::resource('orders', ...), Route::apiResource. route-extractor-php already supports this — expect PASS.

targets.name: slim
targets.hint: Slim 4: $app->get('/path', ...), $app->group('/prefix', fn). Already supported — expect PASS.

targets.name: symfony
targets.hint: Symfony: #[Route('/path', methods:['GET'])] attributes + @Route annotations. Already supported — expect PASS.

targets.name: spring-boot
targets.hint: Spring Boot: @RestController class + @GetMapping('/path')/@PostMapping/@RequestMapping. Java is UNSUPPORTED (no tree-sitter grammar/plugin) — this needs a language bootstrap first; likely FLAGGED, not auto-closed overnight.

targets.name: jax-rs
targets.hint: JAX-RS / Quarkus / Jakarta: @Path('/orders') class + @GET/@POST/@Path methods. Same Java-bootstrap dependency as spring-boot.
